## Verification

## Risk

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I added or updated tests, or explained why tests are not practical.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing or contributor-facing changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, private manifests, model weights, installers, or local cache data.
- [ ] I followed [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for vulnerability-related work.
